sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Results of BUMN Transformation, Rosan Shows Telkom Stock Valuation Reaches IDR 115 Trillion
feed.summary: CEO of the Investment Management Agency (BPI) Danantara, Rosan Roeslani, highlighted transformation efforts within Indonesian state-owned enterprises (BUMNs), citing PT Telkom Indonesia's significant stock valuation increase to IDR 112-115 trillion as a prime example. This surge is attributed to strong human resources, digitization, and clean governance, strategies also improving companies like Garuda Indonesia and Krakatau Steel. Roeslani emphasized a zero-tolerance policy for corruption and the importance of integrity across all BUMNs.

feed.title: Retirement Planning Group LLC Invests $1.66 Million in RTX Corporation $RTX
feed.summary: Retirement Planning Group LLC has acquired a new position in RTX Corporation, investing approximately $1.66 million for 9,932 shares. Other institutional investors, such as Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp, also increased their holdings in RTX during the last quarter. The article further details RTX's stock performance, financial data, recent earnings beat, dividend announcement, and insider trading activity, along with analyst ratings which give RTX a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Grows Holdings in Intuit Inc. $INTU
feed.summary: Stephens Inc. AR increased its stake in Intuit Inc. (INTU) by 41.2% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 13,304 shares valued at $9.09 million. This occurred as Intuit reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with 18.3% revenue growth and providing optimistic Q2 2026 EPS guidance. Despite institutional growth and a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, recent insider selling activity amounted to 388,464 shares, totaling approximately $255.5 million.

feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Has $11.12 Million Holdings in The Boeing Company $BA
feed.summary: Stephens Inc. AR reduced its stake in The Boeing Company by 8.2% in the third quarter, now holding shares valued at $11.12 million. Boeing delivered 600 jets in 2025 and secured significant new orders, signaling improving production, but also faces ongoing litigation risks from the 2019 737 MAX crash and scrutiny over historical guidance on aircraft parts. Institutional investors hold a substantial portion of Boeing's stock, with various funds modifying their positions.

feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Has $8.32 Million Holdings in O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. $ORLY
feed.summary: Meritage Portfolio Management reduced its stake in O'Reilly Automotive (NASDAQ:ORLY) by 19.9% in Q3, selling 19,170 shares but still holding 77,130 shares valued at $8.315 million. Despite this trimming, major institutional investors like Vanguard Group, State Street Corp, and Geode Capital Management aggressively increased their holdings, leading to 85.00% institutional ownership. Analysts maintain a consensus "Buy" rating with an average target price of $112.05 for O'Reilly Automotive, following the company's recent beat on quarterly EPS estimates and strong FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Gets a Buy from Bank of America Securities
feed.summary: Bank of America Securities analyst Michael Feniger reiterated a Buy rating on Vulcan Materials (VMC) with a $348.00 price target. This positive outlook comes despite a recent downgrade from D.A. Davidson to Hold and negative insider sentiment reflected in increased share sales by corporate insiders, including a significant sale by VMC's President last month. The company reported strong Q3 earnings with increased revenue and net profit compared to the previous year.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz demerger: Will the $28.7bn break-up pay off?
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz is set to split into two independent, publicly traded companies: Global Taste Elevation Co. and North American Grocery Co., following the collapse of a major merger. This strategic move aims to sharpen focus and ignite growth, particularly leveraging the higher-margin sauces business. While the separation presents complexities, leadership with prior experience in similar demergers is expected to facilitate the transition, with the split slated for completion in the second half of 2026.

feed.title: Lowest-Dose Radiography Meets Next-Level Imaging: IDEXX Launches ImageVue DR50 Plus
feed.summary: IDEXX Laboratories has launched the ImageVue DR50 Plus Digital Imaging System, its most advanced diagnostic imaging solution for veterinary practices, offering high-definition, AI-powered imaging at the lowest radiation dose. This new system reduces radiation exposure by up to 25% compared to its predecessor and up to 60% compared to other veterinary solutions, enhancing both diagnostic speed and staff safety. The ImageVue DR50 Plus integrates with IDEXX's software and telemedicine solutions, streamlining workflows and providing expert insights for veterinary professionals.

feed.title: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC Sells 11,341 Shares of Quest Diagnostics Incorporated $DGX
feed.summary: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (NYSE:DGX) by 35.9% in the third quarter, selling 11,341 shares and retaining 20,256 shares valued at approximately $3.86 million. Davis selling 55,093 shares and total insider sales reaching $12.59 million in the last three months, though insiders still hold 8.16% of the company. feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Decreases Stake in Autodesk, Inc. $ADSK

feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Sells 4,103 Shares of QUALCOMM Incorporated $QCOM

feed.title: Aveanna lifts full-year outlook above consensus (AVAH:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (AVAH) saw its stock rise approximately 10% after the company increased its full-year guidance for fiscal year 2025. This revised outlook, based on preliminary financial data for the year ending January 3, 2026, now exceeds the consensus estimates.

feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Reduces Stake in The Walt Disney Company $DIS

feed.title: Boston Scientific to buy Penumbra in $14.5 billion deal
feed.summary: Boston Scientific announced its intention to acquire Penumbra for approximately $14.5 billion, aiming to expand its vascular pipeline. The deal values Penumbra at $374 per share, representing a 19.3% premium over its last closing price. Penumbra's shares saw a significant jump in premarket trading following the news, while Boston Scientific's shares experienced a slight decline.

feed.title: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC Sells 8,454 Shares of Avery Dennison Corporation $AVY

feed.title: Boston Scientific to buy Penumbra in $14.5 billion deal
feed.summary: Boston Scientific announced its intention to acquire Penumbra for approximately $14.5 billion, aiming to strengthen its vascular product pipeline. The deal values Penumbra shares at a 19.3% premium to its last closing price, leading to a more than 10% rise in Penumbra's premarket trading, while Boston Scientific's shares saw a 4% decline. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized in 2026.

feed.title: Does Tarsus Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:TARS) Have A Healthy Balance Sheet?
feed.summary: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:TARS) has a strong financial position, with US$329.6m in net cash as of September 2025, despite using debt in its business. The company holds US$401.8m in cash and US$72.3m in debt. Although Tarsus Pharmaceuticals is not yet profitable, it grew revenue by 182% to US$366m in the last year, and its substantial cash reserves provide a buffer for continued growth.

feed.title: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC Cuts Stake in Snap-On Incorporated $SNA
feed.summary: Manning & Napier Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Snap-On Incorporated by 28.5% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 3,687 shares and now owning 9,241 shares valued at $3.20 million. Snap-On reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates with EPS of $4.71 and revenue of $1.19 billion, and increased its quarterly dividend to $2.44. Despite insider selling activity, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $365.00.

feed.title: Albemarle Sits at the Center of Lithium's Next Cycle
feed.summary: Albemarle (ALB) is identified as a key beneficiary of the upcoming lithium cycle due to increasing demand from energy storage, AI data centers, and electric vehicles, following a strong performance in 2025. Several analysts have upgraded ALB stock and raised price targets, anticipating higher lithium prices and continued demand for the company's products. Despite showing overbought signals, the article suggests the stock's momentum indicates continued upside.

feed.title: Further Weakness as SI-BONE (NASDAQ:SIBN) Drops 12% This Week, Taking Five-year Losses to 39%
feed.summary: SI-BONE Inc. (NASDAQ:SIBN) shares have dropped 12% this week, extending its five-year loss to 39%, despite a recent 17% gain over the last three months. The company, which is currently loss-making, has shown strong revenue growth of 20% per year over the past five years. Analysts suggest that the market has been harsh on the stock, given its top-line growth.

feed.title: Legacy Wealth Advisors has once again been named to the Forbes Best-in-State Wealth Management Teams list for 2026
feed.summary: Legacy Wealth Advisors has been named to the Forbes Best-in-State Wealth Management Teams list for the fourth consecutive year in 2026. This recognition highlights their collaborative approach to financial planning, encompassing investment management, retirement strategies, tax-aware planning, estate considerations, and philanthropic goals. The team, including CFP® Wealth Managers Fernando Ereneta, Jennifer Secola, and Kevin Fahy, emphasizes client trust and comprehensive white-glove service.

feed.title: What Is Going On With Alibaba Stock On Thursday? - Alibaba Gr Hldgs (NYSE:BABA)
feed.summary: Alibaba is significantly expanding its consumer AI strategy by integrating its Qwen AI chatbot with core services like Taobao and Alipay, aiming to create a unified "super-assistant" for shopping, travel, and payments. This move, which has entered public testing, allows users to complete various tasks without switching between apps. Despite the significant investment in AI, Bloomberg Intelligence cautions that near-term profitability from AI may be limited for Alibaba, even as its stock performance has shown strong growth over the last year.

feed.title: The Truth About AES Corp: Is This Power Stock the Quiet Giant Everyone’s Sleeping On?
feed.summary: AES Corp is presented as a quiet giant in the clean energy transition, offering a potential buying opportunity for long-term investors. While not a meme stock, it's pivoting aggressively into renewables and energy storage, offering stable cash flow and real-world impact. The article analyzes its business model, price performance, and competitive landscape, concluding it's a "cop" for those seeking infrastructure exposure and willing to do their homework.

feed.title: 12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 healthcare stocks that experienced significant movement during Thursday's pre-market session. It categorizes them into gainers and losers, providing their stock tickers, percentage change, and in most cases, market capitalization. Agape ATP, Ocular Therapeutix, Axe Compute, Penumbra, OS Therapies, and Klotho Neurosciences saw increases, while Inspire Veterinary, ENvue Medical, Gelteq, Psyence Biomedical, VolitionRX, and Radiopharm Theranostics saw declines.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Files Brief in Supreme Court to Protect Freight Brokers Under Federal Law
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson has filed a brief with the U.S. Supreme Court, arguing that federal law should preempt state laws to protect freight brokers from liability in carrier selection. This move aims to ensure consistency in freight transportation and prevent increased costs and uncertainty in supply chains. The company's stock has performed strongly, surging 67% over the past 52 weeks, with analysts offering varied price targets.

feed.title: Top Analyst Says AMD's 2026 Success Depends On These 3 Factors— And It Doesn't 'Need To Beat' Nvidia
feed.summary: Shay Boloor, Chief Market Strategist at Futurum Equities, identified three critical factors for AMD's success in 2026: strong performance of their data center CPUs, the adoption of their Helios platform by major customers, and securing procurement rules that promote multi-vendor AI infrastructure instead of relying on a single supplier like Nvidia. Boloor emphasizes that AMD doesn't need to "beat" Nvidia directly but rather integrate into the default AI architecture of key clients like Microsoft and Meta. This analysis comes amidst new tariffs on high-end AI chips and AMD's ongoing efforts to challenge Nvidia's market dominance.

feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Decreases Stock Holdings in Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX
feed.summary: Meritage Portfolio Management reduced its stake in Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) by 21.3% in Q3 2025, selling 7,003 shares and now holding 25,940 shares valued at $10.16 million. Despite this reduction, institutional ownership in VRTX remains high at 90.96%, with various major investment firms increasing their positions. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for VRTX, with an average price target of $503.80, while company insiders have recently sold a significant amount of shares.

AR increased its stake in Roper Technologies (NASDAQ: ROP) by 36.5% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 3,773 shares to hold a total of 14,117 shares valued at approximately $7.04 million. feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Trims Position in Oracle Corporation $ORCL
feed.summary: Stephens Inc. AR reduced its stake in Oracle Corporation by 7.5% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 5,860 shares and holding 72,665 shares valued at approximately $20.44 million. Oracle has also experienced significant insider selling, with 126,588 shares offloaded by insiders in the last 90 days, leaving them with about 40.9% ownership. The stock recently dropped due to a bondholder lawsuit tied to Oracle's $18 billion note sale for AI infrastructure, raising concerns about legal and financing risks given the company's elevated leverage.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Launches €31.85 Cash Offer for JDE Peet's (JDEPF)
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has launched a public cash offer of €31.85 per share for JDE Peet's (JDEPF) through Kodiak BidCo B.V., aiming to expand its global coffee business. Following the acquisition, KDP plans to split into two independent publicly listed companies: a North American beverage market growth challenger and a global coffee player. The offer period is from January 16, 2026, to March 27, 2026, during which JDE Peet's will still pay a previously declared dividend of €0.36 per share.

feed.title: Hilton expands into furnished apartments with new flexible-stay brand
feed.summary: Hilton (NYSE: HLT) has announced "Apartment Collection by Hilton," a new brand offering flexible-stay furnished apartments, which is set to launch in the first half of 2026. This initiative builds on Hilton's existing inventory of apartment-style units and aims to significantly expand its presence in the market through a partnership with Placemakr. The new brand will provide studio to four-bedroom apartments with amenities like chef-ready kitchens and spacious living areas, integrating with Hilton's booking and loyalty programs.

feed.title: 8 Analysts Have This To Say About Fidelity National Info
feed.summary: Eight analysts have provided ratings for Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE: FIS) over the past three months, resulting in an average 12-month price target of $76.88. The majority of ratings are indifferent or somewhat bullish, with recent adjustments showing some analysts lowering their price targets. The article also provides a financial overview of Fidelity National Info, highlighting its market capitalization, revenue growth, and profitability metrics compared to industry averages.

feed.title: Stroke and clot device maker Penumbra gets $14.5B Boston Scientific bid
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has agreed to acquire Penumbra for approximately $14.5 billion, or $374 per share, in a cash and stock transaction. The deal, which enhances Boston Scientific's cardiovascular and neurovascular portfolio, is expected to be dilutive to Boston Scientific's adjusted earnings per share in the first full year post-closing. Penumbra's CEO, Adam Elsesser, will join Boston Scientific's board upon the transaction's completion, expected in 2026.

feed.title: AI tools aim to make workplace health benefits less confusing for staff
feed.summary: Aflac has joined the Workday Wellness Partner Program to integrate its supplemental health products with Workday's AI-driven benefits platform. This partnership aims to provide AI-driven recommendations, streamline benefits administration for employers, and enhance employee understanding and utilization of their benefits. The initiative directly addresses findings from Aflac's 2025-2026 Workforces Report, which indicated that nearly half of employees do not fully understand their current policies.

feed.title: PPG Industries stock: steady climb, cautious optimism as Wall Street leans bullish
feed.summary: PPG Industries stock has shown a steady climb over the past year, outperforming due to resilient coatings demand and easing input costs. While the stock recently experienced a mild pullback after a strong rally, Wall Street analysts largely maintain "Buy" ratings and have raised price targets, reflecting cautious optimism. The company's future trajectory will depend on factors like industrial production stabilization, construction activity, and continued productivity improvements.

feed.title: ASML, Lam Research, Applied Materials Surge. Why Chip Stocks Are Getting a Boost.
feed.summary: Stocks in the chipmaking supply chain, including ASML, Lam Research, and Applied Materials, saw a significant boost on Thursday. This surge was primarily driven by a "blowout investment forecast" announced by Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC). The positive outlook from TSMC has lifted the entire semiconductor sector.

feed.title: Shareholders that lost money on Varonis Systems, Inc. (VRNS) should contact The Gross Law Firm ...
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is issuing a notice to shareholders of Varonis Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRNS) who purchased shares during the class period of February 3, 2020, to October 28, 2020, encouraging them to contact the firm regarding potential lead plaintiff appointment. The lawsuit alleges that Varonis provided misleading statements to investors and concealed adverse facts about its ability to convert existing customers to its SaaS offering, leading to a significant stock price drop following its Q3 2020 financial results announcement. Shareholders have until March 9, 2026, to register their information and potentially join the class action.

feed.title: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc. - Corporate Bond (BWNB) Price Target Decreased by 40.00% to 25.38
feed.summary: Fintel reports that the average one-year price target for Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc. - Corporate Bond (BWNB) has been cut by 40.00% to $25.38 per share from the previous estimate of $42.29. This new target represents a modest increase of 1.71% from the recent closing price. Institutional ownership in BWNB has also seen a significant decrease, with total shares owned by institutions falling by 84.95% over the last three months.
